# push-profiling

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Toolbar button showing the build/push/check op Gantt scoped to the conversation's worktree.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Pane.Register` "conv-push-profiling", `Conversation.ActionBar` → `PushProfilingButton`
  - Uses: `conversations.useConversationById`, `conversations/conversation-view.conversationPane`, `conversations/conversation-view/action-bar.Conversation`, `debug/profiling/push.getOpProfiling`, `debug/profiling/push.useOpClick`, `debug/profiling/push/push-gantt.OpGantt`, `infra/endpoints.useEndpoint`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/pane.Pane`, `primitives/pane.PaneChrome`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`, `tasks/attempt-view.attemptPane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
